_meta._description: Tower Defense Generators (The 'Sunflowers'). These are placed on the left column to generate CHF over time.
_meta._mechanics: Each generator drops CHF every 'tickSeconds'. 'volatilityRisk' is the % chance they fail to generate a drop on a tick (simulating a bad market day for that asset).

investments.name: Swiss Gov Bond 10Y
investments.description: Slow but extremely reliable. Rarely misses a payout.
investments.historicalBasis: Bonds CSV: Swiss bonds stayed positive during 2008 and 2020 crashes.

investments.name: Gold
investments.description: Steady asset, good defense against inflation.
investments.historicalBasis: Gold CSV: Steady growth, safe haven during most crises.

investments.name: Nestlé
investments.description: Solid dividend payer. Moderate generation, very stable.
investments.historicalBasis: Equities CSV: Defensive stock that fell much less than the SMI index in 2008.

investments.name: S&P 500 ETF
investments.description: The golden standard of growth. Strong yields but can fail on bad days.
investments.historicalBasis: Equities CSV (DJIA proxy): Solid long term, but dropped 35% in COVID crash.

investments.name: NVIDIA
investments.description: Huge CHF generation, but high risk of failing a tick.
investments.historicalBasis: Tech boom 2023. Extremely volatile but massive upside.

investments.name: Bitcoin
investments.description: Massive payouts, but fails more than half the time. High risk/reward.
